titel: The Swedish Pensions Agency at Almedalen in 2026.
html:
Please ensure you are using a recommended web browser. If this is already the case, please try visiting us again in a few minutes.

June 10, 2026 | News

Are you in Visby during Almedalen Week 2026? Our staff will be on-site to answer your questions about pensions. We can also help you create a pension forecast.

For three days, we'll be cycling around the streets of Visby. Feel free to stop by for a coffee and ask us any questions you have about pensions.

When: Tuesday, June 23 – Thursday, June 25, from 9:30 AM to 4:45 PM. Where: Visby, in and around Almedalen.

We warmly welcome you!
tldr: The Swedish Pensions Agency will be present in Visby during Almedalen Week, from June 23rd to 25th, 2026.  You can visit their booth to get help with questions about your pension and have them calculate how much money you will receive when you retire.
lattlast:
The Swedish Pensions Agency, the government agency responsible for pensions in Sweden, will be present in Visby from June 23rd to 25th. They will be there to answer questions about how pensions work and help visitors create a pension forecast.

A pension forecast is a calculation that shows you approximately how much money you will receive when you retire. The staff will be out in the area with cargo bikes, meeting people and answering questions over a cup of coffee.

You can visit them in and around Almedalen between 9:30 AM and 3:45 PM during these three days.
